name: Spam Imperial Tortilla Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the SPAM and cream cheese.
2. Stir in the chopped green onion and dill.
3. Spread one-third of the SPAM mixture evenly over each tortilla.
4. Top with one-third each cucumber, sunflower seeds, and alfalfa sprouts.
5. Roll up each tortilla tightly, sealing it in a "jelly roll" fashion.
6. Wrap the rolled tortillas individually in plastic wrap.
7. Refrigerate for 2 hours before serving.
8. To serve, cut each roll in half.
